"Office Hours" ke baad "Makeup Exam" ki list hai. Is document mein pehle office hours ke baare mein bataya gaya hai, uske baad makeup exam ke details diye gaye hain.

"Payment Deadline" ke pehle "Late Fee" ka zikr hai. Yeh document payment ki deadline se pehle payment karne ki zaroorat ko highlight karta hai, aur agar deadline miss ho jati hai toh late fee lagti hai. Ismein clearly bataya gaya hai ki samay par payment karna kitna important hai, warna extra charges lag sakte hain.

"Visitor Guidelines" ke antargat, aapko kuch niyam aur disha-nirdesh milte hain jo aapko yatra ke dauran palan karne chahiye. Ismein samay ki pabandiyan, vyavahar ke niyam, aur suraksha ke niyam shamil hain. 

"Check-In Desk" ke baad, aapko pravesh ke liye registration karna hota hai, jahan aapki jankari li jaati hai aur aapko entry pass diya jata hai. Yeh prakriya suraksha aur suvidha ke liye zaroori hai.

"Account Settings" aur "Password Reset" ke beech mein, document mein "Account Settings" ko pehle list kiya gaya hai. Iska matlab hai ki pehle user apne account ke settings ko manage kar sakta hai, uske baad password reset ka option aata hai. Yeh sequence user ko apne account ko customize karne aur phir password badalne ke liye step-by-step guide karta hai.

"Health Benefits" ke section mein bataya gaya hai ki yeh benefits health insurance se jude hain, jaise ki medical expenses cover karna, preventive care, aur wellness programs. "Enrollment Form" ke section mein, form bharne ke instructions diye gaye hain, jisme personal details, policy selection, aur documents attach karne ki jarurat hoti hai. Yeh document health benefits ke fayde aur enrollment process ko samajhne ke liye hai.
Haan, INV-2048 ke appointment number ko badle bina, kya aap 10:30 AM par visit ko shift kar sakte hain?
Thik hai, box Apt 5B par chhod dena. Jab aa jao, call kar lena.
